offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, delays in permit submissions cause project hold-ups. We automate permit submissions instead of manual tracking and submission of permits.
problem: Timely submission of required permits for construction projects.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows

Community forums where contractors share tools
try_it: Let users try status tracking for permit applications and manual invoice entry
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
